title: Queens Campus (Segmented) fully loaded in the 3D viewport
capture_instructions: The Queens Campus (Segmented) point cloud must be fully loaded and visible in the 3D viewport. Points should be coloured by classification (ground, vegetation, buildings). The camera should show a top-down or isometric overview of the entire campus scan. The sidebar Settings tab is still open. The status bar shows a non-zero point count.
ui_state: Point cloud loaded, classification colour mode active, Grab/Navigate mode, overview camera angle

annotations.label: Point Cloud section — shows loaded dataset name
